timeline.label: Odd-lot tender at $131/sh for holders of 15 or fewer Class A shares; 287,996 Class A outstanding at record date
FY2004 10-K filed: 15 plants, 2,205 employees, 287,996 Class A shares; last regular SEC annual report
Fiscal year ended; top-10 customers ~36% of net sales; foreign assets ~$12.5M
Class A last filing-era close ~$120 cited in executive compensation footnote
Senior notes: $20M 7.01% due 2011; historical $25M 8.74% notes referenced in risk factors
Hanover Foods founded; family-controlled canned and frozen vegetable processor headquartered in Hanover, PA

industry.structure: Regional U.S. canned and frozen vegetable processors compete with larger national brands and private-label manufacturers; Hanover operates owned plants across Pennsylvania and adjacent states plus Guatemala.
industry.share_shift: National processors and retailer private-label programs gain share in commoditized categories; regional players rely on agricultural contracting and owned plant networks.
industry.trend: Crop yields, input costs, and private-label demand drive margins; OTC Pink disclosure gap leaves current financials unverified since FY2004 SEC reporting ended.
